title: PR Scoring Feature Vector v1
description: Frozen schema for ML pipeline training samples. Every field logged to decision-memory.json must conform to this schema.

author.description: GitHub login of the PR author

created_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the PR was created

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this record was written

has_tests.description: 1.0 if the PR touches test files, 0.0 otherwise

has_docs.description: 1.0 if the PR touches documentation files, 0.0 otherwise

test_ratio.description: Fraction of changed files that are test files

dir_spread.description: Number of distinct top-level directories touched

cluster_id.description: Cluster assignment from scikit-learn engine (null until populated)

cluster_label.description: Human-readable cluster label from scikit-learn engine (null until populated)

cluster_confidence.description: Confidence of cluster assignment from scikit-learn engine (null until populated)

embedding_similarity_scores.description: Similarity scores from PyTorch embedding engine (null until populated)

plateau_detected.description: Whether TensorFlow forecast engine detected a training plateau (null until populated)

forecast_confidence.description: Forecast confidence from TensorFlow engine (null until populated)

decision.description: Tier action taken: auto-merge / manual-merge / request-changes / needs-attention / auto-close

model.description: LLM model identifier used for scoring

json_parsed.description: Whether the LLM returned valid parseable JSON

concerns.description: List of concerns raised by the LLM reviewer

summary.description: Short summary of the PR from the LLM reviewer

code_coverage.description: Code coverage percentage reported by the CI pipeline (0.0–100.0, null if unavailable)

technical_debt.description: Technical debt estimate in lines-of-code per fix (null if unavailable)

cyclomatic_complexity.description: Average cyclomatic complexity of changed files (null if unavailable)
